mapper.select:
/* adm-master-message-sql-oracle.xml - selectMessageCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_MST_MULAAPMSG_HD A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_MULAAPMSG_DT B ON A.MULAAPMSGHDKEY = B.MULAAPMSGHDKEY WHERE 1 = 1
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}

/* adm-master-message-sql-oracle.xml - selectMessageExcelTempList */ #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT '0' AS CHK , UPLDKEY , UPLDSEQ , MULAAPMSGHDKEY , LAKEY , MSGTYPE , DISPLAYMSG , DISPLAYMSGABBR , DELYN , ERRCD , ERRCMT , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_UPLOAD_MESSAGE WHERE UPLDKEY = #{upldkey} AND DELYN = 'N' #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM} ORDER BY PAGING_NUM
mapper.update: /* adm-master-message-sql-oracle.xml - updateExcelUploadVaild */ UPDATE TADMIN_UPLOAD_MESSAGE TUM SET ERRCD = T.ERRCD ,ERRCMT = T.ERRCD FROM (SELECT A.UPLDKEY , A.UPLDSEQ , A.MULAAPMSGHDKEY , A.MSGTYPE , A.LAKEY , A.DISPLAYMSG , A.DISPLAYMSGABBR , A.DELYN , CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_UPLOAD_MESSAGE TEMP WHERE UPLDKEY = #{upldkey} AND TEMP.MULAAPMSGHDKEY = A.MULAAPMSGHDKEY AND TEMP.LAKEY = A.LAKEY AND TEMP.MSGTYPE = A.MSGTYPE ) > 1 THEN 'DATA_DUPLICATED' WHEN A.MULAAPMSGHDKEY IS NULL THEN 'MESSAGEKEY_NULL' WHEN A.LAKEY IS NULL THEN 'LAKEY_NULL' WHEN A.MSGTYPE IS NULL THEN 'MSGTYPE_NULL' WHEN A.DISPLAYMSG IS NULL THEN 'DISPLAYMESSAGE_NULL' WHEN (SELECT D.MULAAPMSGHDKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_MULAAPMSG_DT D WHERE D.MULAAPMSGHDKEY = A.MULAAPMSGHDKEY AND D.LAKEY = A.LAKEY AND D.MSGTYPE = A.MSGTYPE) IS NOT NULL THEN 'IS_EXISTS_DATA' WHEN (SELECT MAX(ADCDDTNM) FROM TADMIN_MST_ADCD_DT WHERE ADCDHDKEY = 'LAKEY' AND ADCDDTKEY = A.LAKEY AND LAKEY = #{lakey}) IS NULL THEN 'ADCD_KEY_NULL' WHEN (SELECT MAX(ADCDDTNM) FROM TADMIN_MST_ADCD_DT WHERE ADCDHDKEY = 'MSGTYPE' AND ADCDDTKEY = A.MSGTYPE AND LAKEY = #{lakey}) IS NULL THEN 'ADCD_KEY_NULL' END AS ERRCD , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_UPLOAD_MESSAGE A WHERE A.UPLDKEY = #{upldkey} ) T WHERE TUM.UPLDKEY = T.UPLDKEY AND TUM.UPLDSEQ = T.UPLDSEQ AND TUM.UPLDKEY = #{upldkey} AND TUM.DELYN = 'N'
mapper.select: /* ams-master-message-sql-oracle.xml - selectMessageExcelError */ #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT '0' AS CHK , UPLDKEY , UPLDSEQ , MULAAPMSGHDKEY , LAKEY , MSGTYPE , DISPLAYMSG , DISPLAYMSGABBR , DELYN , ERRCD , ERRCMT , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_UPLOAD_MESSAGE WHERE UPLDKEY = #{upldkey} AND DELYN = 'N' AND ERRCD IS NOT NULL AND ERRCMT IS NOT NULL #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}
mapper.insert: /* ams-master-message-sql-oracle.xml - insertMessageHdList */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_MULAAPMSG_HD ( MULAAPMSGHDKEY , CLOSDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT TB.MULAAPMSGHDKEY , #{closdate} , TB.INSERTDATE , TB.INSERTURKEY , TB.UPDATEDATE , TB.UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT T.MULAAPMSGHDKEY , CASE WHEN D.MULAAPMSGHDKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN , T.INSERTDATE , T.INSERTURKEY , T.UPDATEDATE , T.UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT TEMP.UPLDKEY , TEMP.MULAAPMSGHDKEY , TEMP.INSERTDATE , TEMP.INSERTURKEY , TEMP.UPDATEDATE , TEMP.UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_UPLOAD_MESSAGE TEMP WHERE TEMP.UPLDKEY = #{upldkey} AND TEMP.DELYN ='N' GROUP BY TEMP.UPLDKEY , TEMP.MULAAPMSGHDKEY , TEMP.INSERTDATE , TEMP.INSERTURKEY , TEMP.UPDATEDATE , TEMP.UPDATEURKEY) T LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_MULAAPMSG_DT D ON T.MULAAPMSGHDKEY = D.MULAAPMSGHDKEY) TB WHERE TB.SAVEYN = 'Y'

/* ams-master-message-sql-oracle.xml - insertMessageDtList */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_MULAAPMSG_DT( MULAAPMSGHDKEY , LAKEY , MSGTYPE , DISPLAYMSG , DISPLAYMSGABBR , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT MULAAPMSGHDKEY , LAKEY , MSGTYPE , DISPLAYMSG , DISPLAYMSGABBR , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_UPLOAD_MESSAGE WHERE UPLDKEY = #{upldkey} AND DELYN = 'N' AND ERRCD IS NULL
